pageContext.name: Aurora Nendoroid
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Good Smile Company are excited to present the Aurora Nendoroid Collectible Figure!  From the world-famous Disney film 'Sleeping Beauty' comes a Nendoroid of Aurora. The Sleeping Beauty figure comes with three interchangeable face plates including a smiling face, a sleeping face, and a somewhat suspicious face.  A pinched dress skirt part that can be interchanged with her standard dress skirt part is included for recreating the moment it begins to turn blue! She also comes with a rose that she can be posed holding, and a papercraft bed that she can be displayed sleeping in is included as well.  Disney fans, be sure to add this Nendoroid of the graceful Aurora to your Disney collectibles display!
